# MLDataTable.PackType.dictionary

**Case**

A packing type that combines the values of several columns into a dictionary type.

## Declaration

```swift
case dictionary
```

## Selecting a packing operation

- **MLDataTable.PackType.sequence**: A packing type that combines the values of several columns into a sequence type.
